channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: ruvnet /RuView | Rust | N/A
item.description: π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

item.title: aquasecurity /trivy | Go | N/A
item.description: Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

item.title: hsliuping /TradingAgents-CN | Python | N/A
item.description: 基于多智能体LLM的中文金融交易框架 - TradingAgents中文增强版

item.title: hesreallyhim /awesome-claude-code | Python | N/A
item.description: A curated list of awesome skills, hooks, slash-commands, agent orchestrators, applications, and plugins for Claude Code by Anthropic

item.title: NousResearch /hermes-agent | Python | N/A
item.description: The agent that grows with you

item.title: ruvnet /ruflo | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: 🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features enterprise-grade architecture, distributed swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration

item.title: mvanhorn /last30days-skill | Python | N/A
item.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

item.title: TauricResearch /TradingAgents | Python | N/A
item.description: TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework

item.title: Crosstalk-Solutions /project-nomad | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.

item.title: harry0703 /MoneyPrinterTurbo | Python | N/A
item.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.

item.title: FujiwaraChoki /MoneyPrinterV2 | Python | N/A
item.description: Automate the process of making money online.

item.title: supermemoryai /supermemory | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Memory engine and app that is extremely fast, scalable. The Memory API for the AI era.

item.title: bytedance /deer-flow | Python | N/A
item.description: An open-source SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.
